CreateVpn.vpcId: ID of the VPC the VPN gateway belongs to
CreateVpn.subnetId: ID of the subnet the VPN gateway belongs to
CreateVpn.type: VPN gateway type: ipsec / ssl / ipsec_ssl
CreateVpn.eip: EIP address to bind to the VPN gateway
CreateVpn.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection (true=enable, false=disable)
CreateVpn.billing.reservation: Prepaid reservation configuration object (required when Prepaid)
CreateVpn.billing.reservation.reservationTimeUnit: Prepaid duration unit, fixed as Month
CreateVpn.tags: List of tags to attach to the VPN gateway

DescribeVpns.type: Filter by VPN type: ipsec / ssl / ipsec_ssl

DescribeVpn.desc: Get detailed information about a VPN gateway

UpdateVpn.desc: Update VPN gateway name or description
UpdateVpn.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway to update

ReleaseVpn.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway to release

RenewVpn.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway to renew
RenewVpn.billing.reservation.reservationTimeUnit: Renewal duration unit, fixed as Month

UpdateVpnDeleteProtect.desc: Enable or disable deletion protection for a VPN gateway
UpdateVpnDeleteProtect.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection (true=enable, false=disable)

BindEip.desc: Bind an EIP to a VPN gateway

UnbindEip.desc: Unbind the EIP from a VPN gateway

CreateVpnTunnel.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the tunnel belongs to
CreateVpnTunnel.cgwId: ID of the remote customer gateway
CreateVpnTunnel.localSubnets: Local subnet list (array of CIDR strings)
CreateVpnTunnel.remoteSubnets: Remote subnet list (array of CIDR strings)

DescribeVpnTunnels.desc: List VPN tunnels under a VPN gateway

UpdateVpnTunnel.vpnConnId: ID of the VPN tunnel to update
UpdateVpnTunnel.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the tunnel belongs to
UpdateVpnTunnel.cgwId: ID of the remote customer gateway
UpdateVpnTunnel.localSubnets: Local subnet list (array of CIDR strings)
UpdateVpnTunnel.remoteSubnets: Remote subnet list (array of CIDR strings)

DeleteVpnTunnel.vpnConnId: ID of the VPN tunnel to delete

CreateSslVpnServer.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the server belongs to
CreateSslVpnServer.interfaceType: Network interface type: tun or tap
CreateSslVpnServer.localSubnets: Local subnet list (array of CIDR strings)
CreateSslVpnServer.remoteSubnet: Client address pool CIDR assigned to VPN clients
CreateSslVpnServer.clientDns: DNS address assigned to VPN clients

UpdateSslVpnServer.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the server belongs to
UpdateSslVpnServer.localSubnets: Local subnet list (array of CIDR strings)
UpdateSslVpnServer.remoteSubnet: Client address pool CIDR assigned to VPN clients
UpdateSslVpnServer.clientDns: DNS address assigned to VPN clients

DeleteSslVpnServer.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the server belongs to
DeleteSslVpnServer.sslVpnServerId: ID of the SSL VPN server to delete

BatchCreateSslVpnUsers.desc: Create SSL VPN users in batch
BatchCreateSslVpnUsers.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the users belong to
BatchCreateSslVpnUsers.sslVpnUsers: List of SSL VPN users to create

UpdateSslVpnUser.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the user belongs to
UpdateSslVpnUser.userId: ID of the SSL VPN user to update

DeleteSslVpnUser.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the user belongs to
DeleteSslVpnUser.userId: ID of the SSL VPN user to delete

CreateUserGateway.desc: Create a customer gateway (remote peer gateway)
CreateUserGateway.name: Customer gateway name
CreateUserGateway.ip: Public IP address of the customer gateway

DescribeUserGateway.desc: Get detailed information about a customer gateway

UpdateUserGateway.desc: Update customer gateway name or description
UpdateUserGateway.cgwId: ID of the customer gateway to update
UpdateUserGateway.name: New customer gateway name

DeleteUserGateway.cgwId: ID of the customer gateway to delete
